title: Can't detach from `podman run` with detach key sequence.
body:
### Issue Description

I try to detach from the below (repro section) `podman run`, but nothing happens.
The below works, what is listed in the repro doesn't;
```
admin1@hpcadmin:~$ podman run -d --rm -t -p 7888:8080 --name myapp registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/httpd-24
44fd47f1da1eb562abf4a77ae97258193bb10e29f214b39f2098926a516015ce
admin1@hpcadmin:~$ podman attach --detach-keys=d myapp
AH00558: httpd: Could not reliably determine the server's fully qualified domain name, using 10.0.2.100. Set the 'ServerName' directive globally to suppress this message
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514503 2023] [ssl:warn] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] AH01909: 10.0.2.100:8443:0 server certificate does NOT include an ID which matches the server name
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514924 2023] [:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] ModSecurity for Apache/2.9.2 (http://www.modsecurity.org/) configured.
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514937 2023] [:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] ModSecurity: APR compiled version="1.6.3"; loaded version="1.6.3"
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514941 2023] [:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] ModSecurity: PCRE compiled version="8.42 "; loaded version="8.42 2018-03-20"
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514949 2023] [:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] ModSecurity: LUA compiled version="Lua 5.3"
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514974 2023] [:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] ModSecurity: YAJL compiled version="2.1.0"
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514977 2023] [:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] ModSecurity: LIBXML compiled version="2.9.7"
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.514980 2023] [:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] ModSecurity: Status engine is currently disabled, enable it by set SecStatusEngine to On.
AH00558: httpd: Could not reliably determine the server's fully qualified domain name, using 10.0.2.100. Set the 'ServerName' directive globally to suppress this message
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.602606 2023] [ssl:warn] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] AH01909: 10.0.2.100:8443:0 server certificate does NOT include an ID which matches the server name
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.602909 2023] [lbmethod_heartbeat:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] AH02282: No slotmem from mod_heartmonitor
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.608020 2023] [mpm_event:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] AH00489: Apache/2.4.37 (Red Hat Enterprise Linux) OpenSSL/1.1.1k configured -- resuming normal operations
[Sat Apr 22 22:41:51.608040 2023] [core:notice] [pid 1:tid 140254042165504] AH00094: Command line: 'httpd -D FOREGROUND'
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. run `podman run --rm -t -p 7888:8080 --detach-keys=d --name myapp registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/httpd-24`
2. type `d`
3. Nothing happens.

### Describe the results you received

Can't detach.

### Describe the results you expected

Can detach.

### podman info output

```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Ubuntu 22.04 with the kubic or whatever PPA think, I don't know how it works.

### Additional information

_No response_
